nodes.name: nexmark.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input with NEXMark streaming benchmark queries, testing plan generation for auction/bid/person event stream analytics.

nodes.name: nexmark_source.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for NEXMark benchmark queries using external source tables, verifying plan generation for source-backed stream analytics.

nodes.name: nexmark_source_kafka.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for NEXMark benchmark queries using Kafka as the streaming source, testing Kafka-backed stream plan generation.

nodes.name: nexmark_temporal_filter.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for NEXMark queries with temporal filter predicates, verifying watermark-based temporal filter plan generation.

nodes.name: nexmark_watermark.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for NEXMark benchmark queries with watermark-based event time semantics, testing watermark propagation in stream plans.

nodes.name: order_by.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for ORDER BY queries, validating sort plan generation and sort key derivation including NULLS FIRST/LAST handling.

nodes.name: over_window_function.yaml
nodes.summary: Comprehensive planner test input for OVER (window function) queries covering ROW_NUMBER, RANK, LAG, LEAD, and aggregation window functions.

nodes.name: parameters.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for parameterized query ($1, $2 placeholders), testing prepared statement plan generation.

nodes.name: pg_catalog.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for pg_catalog system view queries, validating plan generation for PostgreSQL catalog introspection queries.

nodes.name: pk_derive.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for primary key derivation in streaming plans, verifying that the optimizer correctly infers stream keys through various operators.

nodes.name: predicate_pushdown.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for predicate pushdown optimization, verifying that filter conditions are pushed through joins, projections, and aggregations.

nodes.name: project.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for projection operators, testing expression evaluation and projection pushdown in query plans.

nodes.name: project_set.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for ProjectSet (set-returning function) operator, testing unnest and generate_series plan generation.

nodes.name: range_scan.yaml
nodes.summary: Comprehensive planner test input for range scan optimization, validating index range scan plan generation with various predicate types.

nodes.name: row_filter.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for row-level filter policies on tables, testing security filter plan generation.

nodes.name: rw_timestamp.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for _rw_timestamp system column queries, validating plan handling of RisingWave internal timestamp metadata.

nodes.name: secret_ref.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for SECRET reference handling in connector WITH clauses, testing plan generation with credential secret references.

nodes.name: select_except.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for SELECT * EXCEPT (...) syntax, testing column exclusion plan generation.

nodes.name: share.yaml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for shared operator plans (reusing sub-plans across multiple consumers), testing plan sharing optimization.

nodes.name: shared_source.yml
nodes.summary: Planner test input for shared source plans where multiple materialized views consume from the same source operator, testing source sharing optimization.
